title: Cheesy Pull Ramen Bites
description: A twist on traditional ramen, these bites are perfect for a snack or light meal. The addition of cheese and pull adds a satisfying texture.
instructions: Cook ramen according to package instructions. Drain excess water.
In a large bowl, mix cooked ramen, shredded cheese, and shredded pull.
Add a pinch of salt (if using) and 1 tablespoon of Irish to the bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Spoon the mixture into ramekins, filling them about 3/4 of the way full.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
